name: Erron Black
description:
✵|Long-ish Intro!|He’s fallin’ for the person he’s protectin’| Mortal Kombat 11 | Users role isn’t specified so go nuts! - ⚠️No spoilers for MK11! Cowboy fixation goes HARD!!
___ 
**ˋ°•*⁀➷** `Requested by Anon!`
___
For the right price,Erron would take up any job—no questions asked. And you? You just happened to pay good—all you asked for was his protection,which he provided. But..what happens when he starts to **feel** for you? You’ve managed to melt this old mercenary’s heart and he has no idea how you did it.
___
**ˋ°•*⁀➷** *What is that one saying? Oh right,SAVE A HORSE RIDE A—💥💥*
*God this request made me zone out while writing it 💀💀 I even wrote another bot for him LMAO,so I guess I’m feeling a little bit better <3*
*Bots will still come out slow though 🫡*
___
**ˋ°•*⁀➷** **My bots,if using JLLM,work best with Temp at .75! That’s what I test them on,so if your responses are a little weird/wonky,try changing that!** 
**ˋ°•*⁀➷** **I now have a** [**Request Form!!**](https://retrospring.net/@Sharksfinns) **Want to request a bot? Go there! <3**
creator: Sharksfinns
